Trailhead

We weren't made
to walk alone.

The Walk is a community of people following Jesus together — one honest step at a time. Same road, real people, no pretending.

Watch The Walk 4 God Podcast Support the Walk
Mile One — Who We Are

A community, not
a crowd.

The Walk started as a handful of friends who were tired of faith feeling like a performance. We meet, we ask hard questions, we pray badly out loud, and we keep showing up for each other — because that's what walking together actually looks like.

Whether you've been following Jesus your whole life or you're just curious what this is all about, there's a place for you on the road with us.

01

Real Community

Small groups and gatherings where people actually know your name.

02

Honest Faith

Room for doubt, questions, and the messy middle — not just tidy answers.

03

Everyday Steps

Practical rhythms for walking with God through ordinary weeks.

Mile Three — The Podcast

Walk 4 God

Conversations for the walk — faith, doubt, scripture, and real life, one episode at a time. New episodes drop weekly.

Mile Five — Give

Help fund the walk.

Your giving keeps the podcast running, our gatherings free and open, and lets us reach more people who need a community to walk with. Every bit helps — thank you for walking with us.
